title: Doc2ArchAgent Deployment Security YAML Schema
description: Schema for deployment-security.yaml — runtime security enrichment overlay for deployment.yaml. Container hardening, image provenance, and deployment posture linked by container_id and zone_id.

deployment_security_metadata.description: Security-specific metadata linked to a deployment.yaml.

deployment_ref.description: ID of the deployment.yaml this security overlay enriches.

cloud_provider.description: Cloud provider (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP, on-prem). Enables cloud-specific threat rules.

data_residency_region.description: Data residency region for this deployment. Enables GDPR Art 44 checks.

data_residency_required.description: Whether data must remain in the specified region.

shared_responsibility_model.description: Cloud shared responsibility model. Determines customer vs. provider managed controls.

tenant_isolation.description: Multi-tenancy isolation model for this deployment.

container_security.description: Runtime security enrichment for container placements. Matched by container_id and zone_id.

container_id.description: References a container_id in deployment.yaml zone_placements.

zone_id.description: References the zone_id where this container is placed.

read_only_filesystem.description: Whether the container runs with a read-only root filesystem.

resource_limits_set.description: Whether CPU/memory resource limits are configured.

network_policy_enforced.description: Whether NetworkPolicy or equivalent restricts pod-to-pod traffic.

image_tag.description: Container image tag. 'latest' is a supply chain risk.

image_digest.description: Container image SHA256 digest for immutable reference.

image_signed.description: Whether the container image is signed (cosign/Notary).

vulnerability_scan_date.description: Date of last container vulnerability scan.
